summary: Start M7 decision inspector rewrite after M7 first-screen orientation closure reached origin/main. The task turns the right inspector from a raw data stack into a decision assistant while preserving read-model and command preview authority boundaries.

tests_run.result: Started from clean main after PR #208 closure merge.

decisions.decision: Start M7-DECISION-INSPECTOR-REWRITE-001 because art/UX feedback requires a decision-focused right inspector before content lock can be reconsidered.
Do not treat this repair as formal M7 content-lock approval.

risks.summary: UI recommendation copy may accidentally duplicate domain logic if not built from existing read models and preview flows.
risks.mitigation: Writer must use existing read models and preview/confirmation surfaces, with gameplay review before acceptance.

requested_action: Implement the bounded inspector rewrite and return a validated writer handoff for gameplay review.
